what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.

The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-147884b6.
It records an added timestamp of 2026-06-25T02:18:09.101412+00:00.
standouts: The attachment_type 'board_items' indicates this is a board-related attachment.
The target uses a board://item-147884b6 URI to identify the linked board item.

notes: A metadata stub linking attachment att-36f65aac to board item item-147884b6 in the dragnet-development channel.
